summary: A White House/broadcast clip of President Trump delivering his State of the Union address from the House rostrum, claiming only he and congressional Republicans stand between Americans and an open border. A lower-third promotes texting 'SOTU' for updates. It is a raw televised speech with no music or stylized editing, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: STATE OF THE UNION; TEXT 'SOTU' TO 45470 FOR UPDATES; The WHITE HOUSE
